summary: NYC School Construction Authority school-based programs by borough with organization ID, district, building ID, school name, program description, fiscal year, and total cost.
NYC citywide auto fringe benefits for all city employees, including automobile fringe, parking fringe, total fringe, payroll number, and calendar year.
Shapefile of NYC DSNY district sections with section code, district, and shape area and length attributes for sanitation department operational boundaries.
NYC School Construction Authority upcoming anticipated RFP listings including department, estimated cost per contract, services description, and anticipated number of contracts.
NYC Department of Correction monthly security indicators report with counts and rates per 100 ADP for use of force, slashings, stabbings, and homicides by month and year.
List of NYC Community Emergency Response Teams (CERT) including team name, status, community district number and name, and last updated date.
Air quality testing data at Saratoga Village NYCHA site, including temperature, humidity, observations, and VOC measurements across multiple collection time points.
NYC school demographic and enrollment snapshot from 2011-2016, including counts and percentages by race/ethnicity, grade level, gender, and English language learner status by school DBN.
Monthly performance indicators from the NYC Office of Chief Medical Examiner captured for the Mayor's Management Report, with values broken down by month and year.
NYC DOE pre-K transportation vendor data by site, including school name, site name, school year, OPT code, and vendor name.
NYC citywide IT service desk statistics including number of tasks completed and year for the Office of Technology and Innovation service desk operations.
Monthly milestones for NYC Sandy Build It Back program including construction started and completed percentages, applicants served, checks issued, and dollars reimbursed by geography.
2014 Manhattan Borough President capital grant awards including project description, organization address, school number, census tract, agency, city, state, and postcode.
NYC CDBG eligibility by census tract including low-moderate income population percentage, total population, residential area, building area, and eligibility status per census tract.
NYC Select Bus Service leaning bar locations including site ID, bar quantity, cross street, borough, BIN, NTA, FEMA flood zone, and on-street location.
NYC DEP citywide hydrant locations with latitude, longitude, point coordinates, borough code, community board, and unit ID for city water infrastructure.
Monthly NYC HRA job placement statistics including total placements, new hires, self-reported placements, and monthly and yearly percent changes.
Historical NYC Open Storefronts program applications during COVID-19, including retail name, sidewalk area, landmark district status, city, borough, and geographic coordinates.
NYC DOE 2020 fall admission report under Local Law 1486-A, with counts of applicants, offers, and seats available by grade level (pre-K, kindergarten, grades 6 and 9) and school district.
2014-2015 NYC high school programs directory including program description, grade 10 seats and applications, science, math, English, and social studies requirements by program.
2014-2015 NYC high school performance directory with graduation rates, college career rates, student satisfaction scores, and quality review scores compared to similar schools historically.
2012-2013 NYC young adult borough center locations with postcode, community district, police precinct, city council district, census tract, council district, and NTA.
NYC highway sign installation and repair tracking records, including request number, reference number, type name, location, and completion date.
2013-2014 NYC school location data including city, location category, location type, school support team, field support center, address, BEDS number, and NTA.
2019-20 NYC citywide demographic snapshot with enrollment counts by gender, race/ethnicity, economic need index, grade level, and ELL status audited as of October 31.
Monthly NYC HRA home care caseload trend analysis with total case counts, monthly and yearly percent changes by month and year.
2013-2014 NYC DOE high school programs directory with program code, math and English requirements, admissions method, start dates, and grade 10 application fields.
2016 NYC DOE high school programs directory with program requirements, grade 9 and 10 seats and applications, apps per seat ratios, science and social studies requirements.
List of NYC school construction projects removed from the capital plan, including school name, borough, building ID, district, reason for cancellation, and program category.
2016-17 NYC school physical education space data by building, including location name, ownership, grade level, square footage, ATS code, and whether space is shared.
NYC election campaign expenditure records including candidate name, committee, office code, election, street name and number, apartment, sequence number, and purpose of expenditure.
2018-2019 NYC school monthly grade-level attendance data including roster count, present and absent counts, school year, month code, and grade level by school.
2018-2019 NYC school locations with fiscal year, census tract, borough boundaries, NTA name, school support team leader, police precincts, and city council districts.
2021-2022 NYC average class size pilot data comparing 2019-20 and 2021-22 number of students, classes, and average class size with difference metrics by school.
Historical monthly total HASA (HIV/AIDS Services Administration) case counts citywide.
Historical list of NYC TLC-authorized behind-the-wheel training providers including location, city, council district, BIN, BBL, census tract, and zip code.
NYC Business Improvement District boundaries as GIS shapefiles, including founding year, shape area, and perimeter for each of the city's BIDs.
NYC parks public restroom inspection data including hazard and condition type, extent, priority, location, cause, class, problem description, and feature number.
NYC newsrack inspection tracking records including publication name, location ID, last inspection date and result, status date, active status, and borough.
NYC Board of Standards and Appeals action records from 1916-1997 including calendar number, premise address, latitude, longitude, council district, borough, and C2/C3 codes.
NYC ULURP recommendation records listing date, project, ULURP application number, and PDF download link.
NYC Campaign Finance Board financial analysis data for election campaigns including candidate class code, statement period, contribution counts, matching fund amounts, and incumbent status.
NYC MWBE goal waiver records under Local Law 1, including vendor name, original and post-waiver percentages, contract registration date, and partial/full waiver type.
2019-2020 NYC DOE quality review school list with DBN and location name for each school that underwent quality review.
NYC HRA youth cash assistance recipients aged 16-24 by age category, education level, and report date.
NYCHA recurring Resident Economic Empowerment and Sustainability programs including name, description, times, phone number, location, BBL, BIN, postcode, and community board.
NYC five-year capital plan cost summary by capital category, with funding amounts for fiscal years 25-29, subcategory, category, work type, and total.
2015-2016 NYC DOE official audited enrollment register by school, including grade-level counts and demographic breakdowns by race/ethnicity, gender, and poverty status.
2016-2017 NYC school location data with administrative district name, principal title, census tract, field support center name, zip codes, community districts, and borough boundaries.
NYC 3K school construction projects by school, including funding required for FY20-24, total estimated completion, construction start, district, forecast capacity, and leased status.
NYC school replacement project details including district, existing site identification, forecast capacity, funding required for FY25-29, construction start, and borough.
NYC pre-K capital construction projects by school including design start, construction start, forecast capacity, sited status, actual estimated completion, and leased status.
2016-17 NYC student discipline annual report aggregated by discipline code, with counts by code and severity level (principal, superintendent, removal, expulsion) across all schools.
NYC parks conditions and hazards inspection data including hazard/condition type, priority, extent, class, cause, problem description, feature number, and location comments.
List of NYC school construction projects advanced in the capital plan, including school name, building ID, district, borough, and program category.
NYC DOE court liaison contact sheet listing courts and their liaisons with phone, email, address, borough, postcode, council district, community board, and BIN.
2017 NYC DOE diversity report admissions methods data listing school name, DBN, admissions methods used, and whether school is fully screened.
List of NYC school construction projects added to the capital plan, including school name, building ID, borough, district, and program category.
NYC 3K school construction project site locations with council district, latitude, longitude, BIN, BBL, district, school name, census tract, and borough.
NYC five-year school construction plan cost summary by citywide category, with funding amounts per fiscal year (FY25-29), program category, code, and total.
NYC School Construction Authority new capacity program summary by borough and district, with number of buildings and seats and costs for PS, IS/HS, and small PS categories.
NYC financial plan capital cashflow statement (Report 5A) with monthly current and year-to-date actual amounts by department, fund, fiscal year, and fiscal year plan.
NYC 2018-2019 citywide demographic snapshot with enrollment by gender, race/ethnicity, economic need index, ELL status, and grade level from 2014-15 through 2018-19.

2018-2019 NYC school gender and sexuality training report including presence of gender sexuality alliances and LGBTQGNC training completion rates for teachers, administrators, and other staff by school.
Bronx community board member list including first and last name, zip code of application, year, recommending official, community board number, and term expiration.
NYC Broadway corridor curb cut survey data including presence of curb cuts, barriers, detectable warnings, slope measurements, ramp width, and concrete condition at street intersections.
2015-2016 NYC school building bathroom and non-instructional space data under Local Law 60, including number of student bathrooms, shared space status, and geographic district by building.
2016-17 NYC school licensed physical education teacher data by location, including full-time, shared, itinerant, and F-status teacher counts and student-to-teacher ratio.
2019 NYC fall admission report under Local Law 1486-A Part II, with counts of enrolled pre-K and kindergarten students and grade 6 student counts by school district.
2015-2016 NYC school location data including school support team name, X and Y coordinates, status description, council district, managed-by name, and field support center.
NYC DOE designated child abuse liaison locations with office address, BIN, NTA, latitude, longitude, community board, police precinct, and council district.
NYC HRA Adult Protective Services referral-to-close data including total referred and ineligible counts by borough, citywide, and geographic subset with report date.
2018-2019 NYC demographic snapshot by borough with enrollment counts by race/ethnicity, gender, economic need index, and grade level from 2014-15 to 2018-19.
NYC DOE school-age student ridership by OPT school code with counts of eligible stop-to-school and door-to-door students by school year.
2012-2013 NYC school location data including address, city, ATS system code, NTA, police precincts, community districts, zip codes, and borough boundaries.
NYC pre-K project site location details with BIN, BBL, borough, council district, longitude, latitude, district, community board, census tract, and NTA.
NYC DEP recreational boating permit data by basin and year, including counts of kayaks, canoes, rowboats, sailboats, sculls, seasonal tags, temporary tags, and total permits issued.
2018-2019 NYC demographic snapshot by administrative district with race/ethnicity counts and percentages, ELL status, poverty rate, and grade-level enrollment from 2014-15 to 2018-19.
NYC city-funded social service contract site locations including program ID, provider ID, address, city, BIN, BBL, service setting taxonomy, population served, and capacity.
PATH rail line GIS data including census block codes, address ranges, federal direction prefix and suffix, zip codes, and street classification codes.
2020 NYC fall admissions report under Local Law 1486-A Part II with pre-K and kindergarten student enrollment counts and grade 6 counts by school district and category.
NYC Campaign Finance Board intermediary contribution records including candidate class, employer name, state, occupation, street address, and borough code.
2014-2015 NYC school location data with borough block lot, administrative district location code, borough boundaries, community districts, zip codes, and high school network superintendent.
2012 NYC District 75 school survey results with academic expectations, safety and respect, engagement, and communication scores plus teacher, parent, and student response rates.
NYC DEP citywide stormwater outfall locations with outfall type, size, treatment status, point coordinates, receiving water body, latitude, and longitude.
2015-2016 NYC student discipline annual report broken down by race/ethnicity, with removal, principal action, superintendent action, and expulsion counts for each racial group.
2015-2016 NYC EMS transport data for students with disabilities, broken down by general education and SWD status with total EMS transports by location and administrative district.
JFK AirTrain GIS route data including geometry, shape length, name, and URL.
NYC general education student assignment data for stop-to-school routes by transportation vendor for October 2020.
PATH station locations in NYC including station name, geographic coordinates, and URL.
Brooklyn Borough President discretionary contract award allocations including vendor legal name, total amount, line description, and system acceptance date.
2016-2017 NYC DOE school allocation memorandums with SAM name, number, subcategory, linked document, and funding amount for each school allocation.
2015-16 NYC guidance counselor demographic reporting data by school including enrollment, disability percentage, race/ethnicity breakdown, and SETSS and special class rates.
2016-17 NYC school-level physical education instruction data including student counts receiving required and insufficient PE minutes, average minutes and frequency by grade level.
2017-2018 NYC DOE school admissions methods report listing school name, DBN, admissions methods, and fully screened status.
Manhattan Community Award Program (MCAP) allocations from 2007-2017 by fiscal year, including organization name, project title, agency, and allocation amount.
2017-2018 Brooklyn Borough President discretionary grant allocations by fiscal year with organization and allocation amount.
2015-2016 NYC student discipline annual report by discipline code showing principal, removal, superintendent, and expulsion counts for each specific behavior code.
NYC airport polygon GIS data including geometry, shape area, shape length, name, URL, and geoserver identifier for NYC-area airports.
NYC FY2017 Mayor's Management Report data extract with agency performance indicators, targets, and actuals for FY14-FY17 including 4-month actuals.
